Fig tree at Arneson Garden across the street from Wilco, Near Fred Meyer. The tree is tall, fruit is hard to reach, big tree, public space. Fruit was ripe Sept 2021. Possible brown turkey fig? Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-September.
